name: Brian Regan
bio: Brian Joseph Regan is an American stand-up comedian known for clean, observational, and self-deprecating material delivered with expressive body language and facial expressions, drawing on everyday subjects like shipping packages and childhood. He made his television debut on The Tonight Show with Johnny Carson in 1991 and released his first album, Brian Regan: Live, in 1997. He has since become a sustained theater-touring headliner, recorded the first live broadcast stand-up special on Comedy Central in 2015, and released multiple Netflix specials.

timeline.ev: Debuts on The Tonight Show with Johnny Carson
Releases first album, Brian Regan: Live
First Comedy Central special, Standing Up
Records first live broadcast stand-up special on Comedy Central
Releases the Netflix special Nunchucks and Flamethrowers

accolades: First-ever live broadcast stand-up special on Comedy Central (2015)
American Comedy Award nomination for Funniest Male Stand-Up

specials.t: Live from Radio City Music Hall

bits.sp: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
